assertions.title: Collect Shares screen renders with preloaded local share, additional share input, threshold indicator, Recover button

steps.observed: Navigated to /recover/{profileId} with Recover NSEC screen

steps.expected: Local Share #0 loaded, additional share input, 2 of 3 threshold indicator, Recover button present
steps.observed: Screen text showed preloaded local share (Loaded), paste input for Share #1, and 'requires 2 of your 3 shares' messaging with Recover NSEC action

evidence.network: No API requests captured; flow appears client-side

assertions.title: Recover Success shows security warning panel with amber styling and recovered NSEC (masked + revealed)

steps.action: Enter additional share and click Recover NSEC

steps.expected: Amber security warning plus masked and revealed NSEC fields
steps.observed: Security Warning panel displayed; masked NSEC shown; revealed field showed full nsec after clicking Reveal

evidence.network: No API requests captured; flow appears client-side

assertions.title: Copy to Clipboard provides visual feedback, Clear button removes NSEC from display

steps.expected: Recovered NSEC removed from masked and revealed fields
steps.observed: Both fields changed to em-dash placeholders and copy/reveal actions disabled

evidence.network: No API requests captured; flow appears client-side

assertions.title: Full recover flow navigable from Dashboard and back (Dashboard → Recover → Success → Back to Signer)

steps.action: Start on Dashboard and open Recover

evidence.network: No API requests captured; flow appears client-side

assertions.title: Back to Signer link on both Collect Shares and Success returns to Dashboard

steps.action: Click Back to Signer on Collect Shares
Click Back to Signer on Recover Success

evidence.network: No API requests captured; flow appears client-side

frictions.description: agent-browser wait --url checks timed out on some SPA transitions even though route changed successfully
frictions.resolution: Verified transitions using get url + snapshot after click with short waits

frictions.description: agent-browser network request capture returned no requests for this recover flow
frictions.resolution: Used URL transitions, screenshots, and console checks as primary evidence

summary: Tested 5 recover assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Recover collect/success/back navigation and copy/clear behaviors all matched expected contract behavior with no console errors observed.
